articles.title: Spotlight on SIG Storage
articles.excerpt: In our ongoing SIG Spotlight series, we shine a light on the groups that keep the Kubernetes project moving forward. This time, we catch up with SIG Storage, the group responsible for persistent data, volume management, and the interfaces that connect Kubernetes workloads to the storage systems beneath them.

articles.title: Xiaomi’s MiMo Code claims it beats Claude Code past 200 steps
articles.excerpt: A coding agent that scaffolds a working app over lunch will routinely stall around 30 steps into a production refactor.

articles.title: What your logs can’t tell you when an AI agent acts alone
articles.excerpt: For a long time, logs lived in a strange purgatory: technically required, rarely read, and mostly forgotten until something broke.
